name: Project Task List
description: Manages a lightweight per-project to-do list of user-defined task items with completion tracking, independent of AI task execution.

Managers/ProjectTaskManager.cs.content:
class ProjectTaskManager
  L32: LoadTasksAsync() -> Task
  L51: SaveTasks() -> void
  L66: SaveTasksAsync() -> Task
  L71: AddTask(string text) -> ProjectTaskItem
  L88: CompleteTask(ProjectTaskItem task) -> void
  L95: RemoveTask(ProjectTaskItem task) -> void

Models/ProjectTaskItem.cs.content:
class ProjectTaskItem : INotifyPropertyChanged
  Id: string
  Text: string
  ProjectPath: string
  CreatedAt: DateTime
  CompletedAt: DateTime?

patterns: Simple CRUD with JSON persistence per project
dependencies: Reads/writes JSON task list under project .spritely/ folder
